# freeswitch_dialplan_extension (Data Source)

Look up an existing dialplan extension by id.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "freeswitch_dialplan_extension" "ivr" {
  id = "7d0908a7-89e5-4a62-a0f7-7865cc9be8a2"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->

- `created_at` (String)
- `domain` (String)
- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `name` (String)
- `priority` (Number)
- `updated_at` (String)
